raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find -mtime -60 and tar -czf. Use find with -print0 and tar -T -? tar can read list. Use tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -mtime -60 -type f -print). But better: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -mtime -60 -type f -print). Provide command.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need find -mtime -60 and tar -czf. Use find with -print0 and tar -T -? tar can read list. Use tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -mtime -60 -type f -print). But better: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -mtime -60 -type f -print). Provide command.
